organic.title: NIRF Engineering Top-25 Placement Statistics 2024 - National Institutional Ranking Framework
organic.snippet: NIRF top-25 engineering institutions 2024: median CSE/IT placement rate 78% (range 64-94%, n=25). Median CTC ₹8.4 LPA. Top performers: IIT Madras (96%), IIT Delhi (95%), BITS Pilani (89%), VIT Vellore (86%), SRM (84%).
